_readme: txtr plugin registry - each entry maps a plugin name to its metadata

_types.single: url points to a raw .py file
_types.git: url is a git repo - txtr clones it into the plugin dir (preferred for packages)
_types.package: url points to a .zip of the plugin folder (fallback if git unavailable)

wordcount.description: word count in statusbar and :wordcount command
wordcount.author: benjibrown

freeze.description: code screenshot plugin powered by the freeze CLI
freeze.author: benjibrown
